rows.finalText: For "What is the next right step in my calling", the cards keep circling back to purpose / calling themes with a right path emphasis. House (4) in Past sets the tone with the need to focus on home base, habits, and emotional grounding. House colors your calling through base structure, fixed conditions, and the foundations that have to hold before anything else can stretch. Present turns on Fish (34), bringing the theme that resources and flow patterns become central to the hinge of the reading and asking for one careful adjustment. Fish colors your calling through where energy, support. The likely direction shows in Future through Tower (19), and it suggests you may need stronger standards and boundaries once the pivot is met directly. Tower colors your calling through distance, standards, official structure, and the part of the situation governed by rules rather than mood. Fish (34) with Tower (19) show what most shapes the question of calling: a blend of money and institution, asking you to monitor movement and align values while staying alert to emotional isolation or rigidity. Fish (34) is the real hinge in this spread. Here, Fish emphasizes where energy, support, and real-world movement either begin feeding the path or reveal what is not actually sustaining it. Fish (34) with Tower (19) keep emphasizing a blend of money and institution, asking you to monitor movement and align values while staying alert to emotional isolation or rigidity. Monitor movement and align values so Tower (19) can land as lived experience rather than just possibility.
